metadata.name: clanker5000
metadata.description: Clanker 5000 — native-Solana race escrow + parimutuel market for The Clanker 500

instructions.name: accrue_emissions
docs: Mint work emissions for ONE verified job — the anti-gaming core. Mints
$CLANK to the operator only when the five on-chain links all hold:
1. the job's `Attestation` is oracle-`verified` (score ≥ 70),
2. a REQUESTER wrote `Feedback` for this agent (and it is not
self-feedback — the program already forbids that in `give_feedback`),
3. the operator is bonded ≥ the minimum and the agent's reputation is
not net-negative,
4. the current epoch's cap (and the 1B bucket) is not exhausted,
5. this (agent, job) has not already been claimed (the `JobClaim` PDA
`init`s once; a second attempt collides and fails).
Facilitator/keeper-gated. v1 simplification: the `Feedback` account is
validated by its fields (agent + non-self client), not bound to `job_hash`
— a stricter binding is a follow-up; the one-shot `JobClaim` bounds abuse.

accounts.name: feedback
docs: Any genuine requester `Feedback` PDA for this agent (fields checked in-handler).

instructions.name: bond_operator
docs: Bond $CLANK against an `Agent` identity. Only the agent's owner can bond;
the bond is slashable and is the skin-in-the-game that gates emissions
(`bonded >= min_operator_bond`) and weights the reward (`emission_reward`).

instructions.name: bond_verifier
docs: Bond $CLANK to act as a verifier (forwarder/judge). Slashable; this is the
stake that makes a corrupt verdict cost more than it could steal
(TOKENOMICS §13.2 security budget).

instructions.name: cancel_race
docs: Refund staked drivers and void the race. `challenger_token`/
`opponent_token` must be owned by the respective drivers.

instructions.name: claim
docs: Claim a pro-rata share of the pool: `stake * total_pool / winning_pool`.

instructions.name: claim_staking_yield
docs: Claim accrued USDC yield (settled pending + freshly accrued) from the
yield vault (PDA-signed). Real yield — never minted.

instructions.name: execute_buyback
docs: Execute one buyback as an **atomic OTC fill** against the keeper/MM: the
program receives `clank_in` $CLANK and pays `usdc_out` USDC in the SAME
instruction (never releases USDC without receiving tokens). Bounded by:
* the **value-aware P/F throttle** (`buyback_allowance`) computed from the
keeper-supplied `clank_price_usdc6` and `fees_annualized_usdc6`
(production: read a Pyth/Switchboard price + on-chain fees — v1 trusts
the permissioned keeper, bounded by `max_per_call` + `max_price`),
* a **slippage** ceiling (`max_price_usdc6`),
* a per-call cap + min interval (a TWAP/%-ADV proxy, §12.5).
Then burns `burn_bps` of the acquired $CLANK (the burn-vs-distribute dial).

instructions.name: fund_pit_fund
docs: Route the **60%-of-fees** buyback share (USDC) into the Pit Fund. Permissionless top-up.

instructions.name: fund_staker_bucket
docs: Route USDC into the staker-yield bucket — the **30%-of-fees** real-yield
stream (TOKENOMICS §13.1). Distributes pro-rata by bumping
`acc_usdc_per_share`. Permissionless top-up (more yield only helps).

instructions.name: give_feedback
docs: The requester rates an agent. The signer must not be the agent owner
("self-feedback not allowed"). Each feedback is stored in its own PDA
(index = running count), and the agent's running count/sum back the
leaderboard average. Emits `NewFeedback` for indexers/BigQuery.

instructions.name: init_attestation
docs: Init the consensus-verdict gate. `forwarder` is the Chainlink forwarder
authorized to write reports; `Pubkey::default()` (all zeros) = unrestricted
(sim/demo), matching the EVM `forwarder == address(0)` escape hatch.

instructions.name: init_event_pass
docs: One-time init. `minter` is the guard robot's wallet (the only key that
can mint passes).

instructions.name: init_pit_fund
docs: One-time Pit Fund init: the USDC intake vault + the CLANK holding vault
(both under one PDA authority), plus the buyback policy. `keeper` is the
permissioned market-maker that fills buybacks; the P/F band and per-call
cap implement the value-aware throttle (§12.2).

instructions.name: init_slashing
docs: One-time slashing init: the $CLANK slash vault (holds verifier bonds and
in-flight challenger bonds) + the `SlashConfig` policy. `authority` is the
dispute resolver (governance/DAO). `slash_bps` is the fraction of a
verifier's bond burned when a dispute is upheld; `challenger_bond` is the
$CLANK a challenger must post (returned if upheld, burned if frivolous).

instructions.name: init_stake_pool
docs: One-time staking init. Creates the CLANK stake vault and the USDC yield
vault (both under one PDA authority), plus the global `StakePool`.
`cooldown_secs` is the unstake delay set on each stake.

instructions.name: init_token
docs: One-time token init. The $CLANK mint must already exist with its mint
authority set to the program PDA `[CLANK_MINT_AUTH_SEED]` — so after this,
**only the program can mint, and only via `accrue_emissions` under the
epoch cap.** Opens emission epoch 0. Genesis/vesting buckets are minted
separately (audited vesting program) before authority is handed to the PDA.

instructions.name: init_treasury
docs: Init the fleet treasury. `owner` is the Ledger hardware-wallet address;
the USDC vault is a PDA token account.

instructions.name: initialize
docs: One-time program configuration. `authority` is the operator (the only
key that can rotate the facilitator), mirroring the EVM `operator`.

instructions.name: join_race
docs: Join a race in `slot` (0 = challenger, 1 = opponent). The driver signs
directly and funds the stake from their own ATA; the fee goes to the
treasury token account.

instructions.name: mint_pass
docs: Mint an access pass to `to` at the auction-settled `price_usdc6`. The
pass is a program-native record (PDA per id); `holds(who)` is an
off-chain getProgramAccounts query filtered by `owner` (the Solana
idiom in place of an ERC-721 balanceOf). Minter only.

instructions.name: open_dispute
docs: Open a dispute against a verifier's verdict for `job_hash`. The challenger
posts `challenger_bond` $CLANK into the slash vault; the slash amount is
snapshotted from the verifier's current bond. Starts the resolution window.

instructions.name: open_market
docs: Open a parimutuel market. The signer becomes the judge (the guard
robot's wallet that attests the finish); `operator` is the Ledger-
governed key allowed to rotate the judge.

instructions.name: open_race
docs: Open a race for `race_id` (must equal the running counter). Facilitator
only. Creates the race account and its USDC vault.

instructions.name: place_bet
docs: Place a single bet. One bet per bettor (enforced by the `bet` PDA) and
one bet per human (enforced by the `nullifier` PDA — a reused World ID
nullifier collides on an already-initialized account and fails).

instructions.name: register_agent
docs: Register who owns `agent_id` (the robot's wallet), so the registry can
reject self-feedback. Mirrors `setAgentOwner` (first writer wins — here
the PDA can only be initialized once).

instructions.name: resolve_dispute
docs: Resolve a dispute after its window. Resolver-gated. If **upheld**: burn the
slash amount from the verifier's bond and return the challenger's bond. If
**rejected**: burn the challenger's bond (frivolous-dispute cost). Slashed
$CLANK is always **burned, never paid to the challenger** — so there is no
incentive to false-accuse (SPEC §6).

instructions.name: roll_epoch
docs: Advance to the next emission epoch once the current one's window has
elapsed. Permissionless. The new cap and reward/job both decay by
`decay_num/decay_den` — the published taper (TOKENOMICS §6).

instructions.name: set_buyback_params
docs: Governance: retune the buyback band, cap, interval, burn split, or keeper.

instructions.name: set_emission_params
docs: Retune the emission schedule: min operator bond, epoch length, and the
decay applied to the cap + reward each `roll_epoch`. Governance-gated.

instructions.name: set_slash_params
docs: Retune slashing policy and/or rotate the dispute resolver. Gated by the
current resolver (`SlashConfig.authority`).

instructions.name: set_stake_cooldown
docs: Set the unstake cooldown on the stake pool. Governance-gated via `TokenConfig`.

instructions.name: set_token_authority
docs: Rotate the governance authority (e.g. hand off to a DAO/Squads multisig).

instructions.name: settle_market
docs: Judge settles the market with the Gemini-verified finish proof (sha256
hash + Walrus blob id).

instructions.name: settle_race
docs: Pay the full 2x stake to the winner. `winner_token` must be owned by the
winning slot's driver.

instructions.name: stake
docs: Stake $CLANK. Settles any pending yield first (so the new, larger balance
doesn't retroactively earn), pulls CLANK into the stake vault, and resets
the unstake cooldown.

instructions.name: sweep_market
docs: Sweep residual vault balance (parimutuel rounding dust) to a recipient
after the claim window. Operator-gated and **time-locked**: callable only
once `CLAIM_WINDOW_SECS` have elapsed since settlement, so winners always
have a guaranteed window to claim before any sweep. Fixes the otherwise
unreclaimable dust from `claim`'s flooring. See docs/MAINNET_READINESS.md §1.

instructions.name: unbond_verifier
docs: Withdraw verifier bond. Blocked while any dispute against this verifier is
open (you can't exit ahead of a slash).

instructions.name: unstake
docs: Unstake after the cooldown. Settles pending yield, then returns CLANK from
the stake vault (PDA-signed).

instructions.name: withdraw_treasury
docs: Withdraw fleet earnings. Owner-gated (the Ledger-held key) — the
governance boundary for the demo climax. Kept minimal so a Ledger Solana
clear-sign renders "Withdraw <amount> USDC to <recipient>".

instructions.name: write_attestation
docs: Land the DON's consensus verdict for a job (keyed by `job_hash` =
sha256/keccak of the job string, computed client-side). The robot's own
claim never settles anything — this is the verdict downstream reads via
`verified`. Reporter MUST be the configured forwarder (no open path).

errors.name: BadState
errors.msg: invalid race state for this action

errors.name: BadAmount
errors.msg: amount does not match the race terms

errors.name: BadRaceId
errors.msg: race id does not match the running counter

errors.name: Lost
errors.msg: bet did not pick the winner

errors.name: NotMinter
errors.msg: caller is not the pass minter

errors.name: BadPassId
errors.msg: pass id does not match the running counter

errors.name: NotOwner
errors.msg: caller is not the treasury owner (Ledger approval required)

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: reporter is not the authorized forwarder

errors.name: BadForwarder
errors.msg: forwarder must not be the zero key

errors.name: BadMintAuthority
errors.msg: $CLANK mint authority must be the program PDA

errors.name: NotAgentOwner
errors.msg: caller does not own this agent

errors.name: FeedbackMismatch
errors.msg: feedback does not match this agent

errors.name: BondMismatch
errors.msg: operator bond does not match this agent

errors.name: BuybackThrottled
errors.msg: buyback throttled by the value-aware band or per-call cap

errors.name: BuybackSlippage
errors.msg: buyback price exceeds the slippage ceiling

errors.name: HasOpenDisputes
errors.msg: verifier has open disputes; cannot unbond
